title: Nikola Jokic: Delivers monster triple-double
summary: Jokic finished with 23 points (9-16 FG, 0-1 3Pt, 5-7 FT), 17 rebounds and 17 assists in 35 minutes during Tuesday's 125-123 win over the Suns. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

title: Donovan Mitchell: Strikes for 42 points in victory
summary: Mitchell tallied 42 points (14-22 FG, 3-7 3Pt, 11-11 FT), two rebounds and three assists in 35 minutes during Tuesday's 136-131 win over the Magic. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
